ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the measurements were taken */,
  "so2" REAL /* Sulfur dioxide (SO2) concentration */,
  "no2" REAL /* Nitrogen dioxide (NO2) concentration */,
  "rspm" REAL /* Respirable suspended particulate matter (RSPM) concentration */,
  "spm" REAL /* Suspended particulate matter (SPM) concentration */,
  "aqi" REAL /* Calculated Air Quality Index (AQI) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "validity" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was last maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person responsible for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pollutant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Common sources of the pollutant */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact on health and environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_calculations" (
  "aqi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQI calculation */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollutant involved in the calculation */,
  "sub_index" REAL /* Sub-index value used in the AQI calculation */,
  "aqi_range" TEXT /* Range of AQI values and corresponding air quality categories */,
  "health_implications" TEXT /* Health implications associated with different AQI ranges */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the AQI */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the calculation method is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the calculation method is valid */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or references for the calculation method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aqi_calculations_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station for which the report is generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the air quality data in the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  "distribution_list" TEXT /* List of recipients or groups that received the report */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the report is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)
